violations.text: Cooked lobster meat was observed thawed in the inside walk-in cooler with intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood items that are packaged in ROP shall be completely removed from their original packaging prior to thawing. Food items were observed held at 35 degrees Fahrenheit and were removed from their original packaging during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the cube ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025

The door to the employee toilet room on the second floor is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to food preparation spaces shall be self-closing to prevent potential contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets on the walk in and low boy 1 were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the dish machine area has an accumulation of debris. The area must be maintained as often as needed to be kept clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2024
